title: Blood Unit Compatibility Matching
description: The system shall match transfusion requests to compatible blood units based on ABO blood group and Rh factor compatibility, excluding incompatible matches.
rationale: To ensure patient safety by preventing the use of incompatible blood units in transfusions.
business_value: Improves patient safety and reduces the risk of adverse reactions from incompatible blood transfusions.

source.description: As a lab technician I need to match transfusion requests to compatible blood units based on type and Rh factor So that patients receive safe transfusions

acceptance_criteria:
Given a transfusion request for blood type A positive
When the system searches for compatible blood units
Then it returns only units that are A positive or O positive
postconditions: Compatible blood units based on type and Rh factor are suggested
functional_constraints: Matching considers ABO blood group and Rh factor compatibility
Only units with identical or compatible type and Rh factor are suggested
edge_cases: When a transfusion request is made for a blood type not supported by the system (e.g., AB negative)
When there are no compatible units available in the inventory
When the request specifies a Rh factor that is not recognized or supported
dependencies: ABO blood group and Rh factor database

interfaces.name: Blood Unit Inventory Database
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the database to retrieve and update information about available blood units.

interfaces.name: ABO Blood Group API
interfaces.description: The requirement uses an external API to validate and fetch ABO blood group and Rh factor compatibility.

test_cases.description: Given a transfusion request for blood type A positive, When the system searches for compatible blood units, Then it returns only units that are A positive or O positive.
test_cases.expected_result: The system filters and returns compatible blood units (A+ and O+) while excluding incompatible units.

test_cases.description: Given a transfusion request for an unsupported blood type, When the system searches for compatible blood units, Then it should return an error message.
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays an error indicating that the requested blood type is not supported.

test_cases.description: Given a transfusion request with an unrecognized Rh factor, When the system searches for compatible blood units, Then it should return an error message.
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays an error stating that the specified Rh factor is not recognized or supported.
